protocols.Paper_title: Clinical-grade Oncolytic Adenovirus Purification using Polysorbate 20 as an Alternative for Cell Lysis
protocols.Evidence: Comparison of downstream steps using two different detergents for cell lysis - Triton X-100 and Polysorbate 20; TP recovery was determined by qPCR.
